scripts.portable: powershell -Command "$ver=(Select-String -Path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -Pattern '^version = \"(\d+\.\d+\.\d+)\"' | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches[0].Groups[1].Value }); $exe='src-tauri/target/release/telegram-drive.exe'; $out='TelegramDrive_v'+$ver+'_portable.exe'; if(Test-Path $exe){ Copy-Item $exe $out -Force; Write-Host ('Ejecutable portable: '+$out) -ForegroundColor Green }else{ Write-Host 'Primero ejecuta: npm run tauri build' -ForegroundColor Yellow }"
